title: 4  creating BA dashboard using XLOOKUP
text:
4.1 dashboard
An app/interface where end users are able to see the key parameters and analysis in one place.
we will create a dashboard for a sales manager based on historical sales data in the previous years and in different geographical regions.
The starting file is creating_dashboard.xlsx
The white cells are where the end users enter the year/region of interest and your job is to fill the formula in the yellow cells to show the sales or statistics.
#1 find out the sales of any region (specified by the user) in year of 2015 you only need to use one XLOOKUP function
#2 find out sales of any year in the south region you only need to use one XLOOKUP function
#3 find out the sales in any region and any year you need two XLOOKUP function to solve this
#4 find out the average sales in any year combining AVERGE function and XLOOKUP function
#5 find out the year when sales is the highest for any region specified by the user the outcome of the XLOOKUP function is year here, which is different from questions 1-4
crumbs: 4  creating BA dashboard using XLOOKUP

title: 4  creating BA dashboard using XLOOKUP
text:
4.2 key take-way on XLOOKUP function
#1 the lookup value and lookup array should be the same thing in nature, meaning matching year to a group of years, a region to a group of regions
#2 the lookup array is always a single row or column
#3 the return array can be a single row/column or a matrix

if the return array is a single row/column, the outcome of the function is a single value
if the return array is a matrix, the outcome of the function is a row or a column.
crumbs: 4  creating BA dashboard using XLOOKUP

title: 2  Practicing combining AND, OR, IF files
text:
3 Practicing combining AND, OR, IF files
Files: grades_levelup.xlsx
crumbs: 2  Practicing combining AND, OR, IF files

title: 2  Practicing combining AND, OR, IF files
text:
3.1 question 1
calcuating extra points:
1. 10 extra points for students who get less than 50 in test 1 and major either in Finance or acounting,
2. 5 extra points for the rest of the students who major either in finance or accounting,
3. 0 otherwise
crumbs: 2  Practicing combining AND, OR, IF files

title: 2  Practicing combining AND, OR, IF files
text:
3.2 question 2

10 points for two group of students: students major in management, or students who major in marketing and get at least 80 in test 2,
5 points for students who major in accounting
0 otherwise
crumbs: 2  Practicing combining AND, OR, IF files

title: 2  Practicing combining AND, OR, IF files
text:
3.3 question 3

10 points for students who do not major in accounting or for students who get more than 80 in test 3
0 otherwise
crumbs: 2  Practicing combining AND, OR, IF files

title: 2  Practicing combining AND, OR, IF files
text:
3.4 question 4
give students PASS if they get at least 60 in at least 2 out of the six tests, Fail otherwise
hit: questions like this can be answered using COUNTIFS function or LARGE/SMALL function
crumbs: 2  Practicing combining AND, OR, IF files

title: 2  Practicing combining AND, OR, IF files
text:
3.5 question 5
find out the number of students who major in finance and get less than 60 in test1
crumbs: 2  Practicing combining AND, OR, IF files

title: 3  02-summary_statstics_functions
text:
4 Summary statistics functions
This is a group of functions that summarize the characteristics of a GROUP based on certain conditions.

4.0.1 COUNTIFS AVERAGEIFS SUMIFS MAXIFS MINIFS
#1 find out the number of students who major in finance and get less than 60 in test1
#2 find out the number of students who get between 80 and 90 in test 4 (exclusive of 80 and 90)?
#3 find out the average of test 3 of all students who major in management
#4 find out the average of test 3 of all students who major in management and who get at least 60 in test 2
#5 find out the average of test 1 score of all students who major in management or marketing
#6 find out the number of students whose test 2 score is either more than 80 or less than 50
